inline_comments.message: What is the difference between 10001 and 10003?

10003 is the port to use to push (snapshot) images. 10001 is the one for general read.

In https://jira.linuxfoundation.org/plugins/servlet/theme/portal/2/IT-21516 Jessica gave us an explanation of the process that happens when a new repo is created:

A new local user "repo-name" is created and its given permissions to push docker images in ports 10003 (snapshots), 10004 (staging), 10002 (release). And it's given read access to port 10001 (public)
